description: Following a meeting with a KOL, an MSL must log the details of the interaction in the CRM system.

nodes.task_description: Create a new interaction record in the CRM for the specific KOL.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates a new record linked to the KOL's profile.

nodes.task_description: Summarize the key discussion points and any scientific insights gathered from the KOL.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent writes a concise summary, noting the KOL's interest in a particular off-label research area.
Agent creates a follow-up task to send the KOL a specific research paper that was discussed.
